item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa pendekatan Indonesia lebih menekankan keselarasan antara kepentingan kolektif dan hak individu.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-first priority but with an explicit rights caveat, then shifts toward a balance framing while still grounding the view in Indonesian collective justice. Agent B stays firmly rights-first throughout, allowing only narrow public-health or public-safety exceptions. Agent A includes the English phrase "individual rights" in an Indonesian turn.
